Icon-only button for modal close, header shortcuts, and row actions; transparent with a faint hover fill.

```jsx
<IconButton title="Close" onClick={close}><i className="ph ph-x" /></IconButton>
<IconButton shape="circle" variant="menu"><i className="ph ph-house" /></IconButton>
```

`shape` square (default) or circle; `variant="menu"` gives the action-menu fill used in the sidebar header.
